vulnerabilities.evidence: Script tag injected, JavaScript protocol handler
vulnerabilities.remediation: Encode all user-supplied output using context-aware encoding (HTML, JS, URL). Implement a strict Content-Security-Policy header. Use HTTPOnly and Secure flags on cookies. Reference: OWASP XSS Prevention Cheat Sheet.
